---
title: "Finnish Greenhouse Yields"
---

## Row
```{python}
import altair as alt
from altair.datasets import data
import pandas as pd

df = pd.read_csv("gh_yields.csv")
df['Year'] = df['Year'].astype(str)

crop = alt.selection_point(encodings=['x'], empty=False, nearest=True)

pnt = alt.selection_point(encodings=['y'], empty=False, nearest=True)

color = (
    alt.when(crop)
    .then(alt.ColorValue("steelblue"))
    .otherwise(alt.ColorValue("grey"))
)


base = alt.Chart(df, width=500, height=500).encode(
    x=alt.X('Year:T', timeUnit='year', scale=alt.Scale(domain=[2014, 2025])),
    y=alt.Y('Yield:Q').bin(maxbins=10),
    size=alt.Size('count()').title('Crops in Selection'),

).add_params(pnt)

bg = base.mark_point(color='grey')

line = base.mark_line(color='steelblue').transform_filter(crop)


bar = alt.Chart(df, width='container', height=200).mark_bar().encode(
    x=alt.X('Crop:N').sort('-y'),
    y='sum(Area):Q',
    color=color
).add_params(crop)


lines = alt.Chart(df, width=500, height=500).mark_line().encode(
    alt.X('Year:T', timeUnit='year', scale=alt.Scale(domain=[2014, 2025])),
    alt.Y('Yield:Q'),
    alt.Color('Crop:N').title('Crop')
).transform_filter(
    pnt | crop
)

alt.vconcat(
    ((bg + line) | (lines)),
    bar, center=True, autosize='pad'
).resolve_legend(
    color="independent",
    size="independent"
).configure_legend(
    orient="right",
    offset=10
)
```
